instruction: Open the calendar application and add an event 'meeting' on December 28th.

actions.plan:

(Screenshot Analysis)
The current screen shows the Ubuntu desktop with various application icons on the left sidebar. The calendar application is not immediately visible, so I need to locate and open it.

(Next Action)
Click on the 'Activities' button at the top-left corner to search for the calendar application.

(Grounded Action)
```python
agent.click("Activities button")
```

(Previous action verification)
The previous action was to click the forward arrow to navigate to December. The screenshot shows that the calendar is now displaying events for December, confirming that the navigation was successful.

(Screenshot Analysis)
The current screenshot displays the calendar for December, showing various dates with events. The goal is to add a new event on December 28th. To do this, I need to select the date December 28th first.

(Next Action)
Click on December 28th to prepare for adding the new event.

(Grounded Action)
```python
agent.click("December 28th date")
```

(Previous action verification)
The previous action was to click on the date "28" in December, which seems to have been successful as the calendar now highlights December 28th. The next step is to add an event for this date.

(Screenshot Analysis)
The calendar application is open, displaying the month of December. The date "28" is highlighted, indicating it has been selected. No events are currently listed for December 28th.

(Next Action)
Click on the area where new events can be added for December 28th.

(Grounded Action)
```python
agent.click(starting_description="Add event button", ending_description="for December 28th")
```

(Previous action verification)
The previous action successfully opened the calendar application and brought up the interface for adding a new event on December 28th. The dialog box is ready to accept input for the event details.

(Screenshot Analysis)
The current screenshot shows the calendar application with a pop-up window titled "New Event on December 28" open. This indicates that the system is prepared to receive the name of the event. The next logical step is to type the event name into the provided text field.

(Next Action)
Type 'meeting' into the text field in the 'New Event on December 28' dialog box.

(Grounded Action)
```python
agent.type(element_description="Text field in the 'New Event on December 28' dialog box", text="meeting")
```

(Previous action verification)
The event 'meeting' on December 28th has been successfully added to the calendar, as indicated by the tooltip confirming the date and details.

(Screenshot Analysis)
The screenshot shows the calendar application with an event labeled 'meeting' scheduled for Sunday, December 28, 2025. This confirms that the task of adding the event has been completed.

(Next Action)
Since the event has been successfully added, no further actions are required.

(Grounded Action)
agent.done()
